forecast.name: Today
forecast.detailedForecast: Sunny, with a high near 91. Northwest wind around 8 mph.

forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 66. West wind 3 to 7 mph.

weather_report:
Boston awakens to a splendid morning, basking in a clear blue sky and the warm embrace of the sunlight. With the temperature nudging toward 91 degrees, a gentle northwest wind whispers through the streets, carrying the scents of summer into every corner. This day promises an abundance of warmth and clarity, untouched by fog or haze, creating a palette of vivid blues that stretches toward the horizon. The comfort of the early hours gives way to the promise of a sultry afternoon, making it an ideal time for leisurely strolls along the Charles River or a serene coffee break in a shaded nook of a local café. 

As the sun travels across the sky, revel in the joy of wearing lightweight and breathable fabrics that allow your skin to breathe. A casual cotton shirt and shorts will keep you cool, while a broad-brimmed hat might serve both style and protection against the sun's bright rays. Later, as the day transitions into night, the temperature will dip gracefully to around 66, offering a perfect invitation for an evening walk or a relaxed dinner on an outdoor patio, where the pleasantness of the air will cradle you softly. Today’s clarity and warmth beckon you outside to savor the beauty of the season, to appreciate life’s simple pleasures while the sun smiles down upon this historic city.
